items.briefing:
A cyber breach affecting Canvas, a widely used learning platform, is raising concerns for Australian schools about the security of student data — staff in the education sector should be alert to any unusual account activity or communications referging to Canvas. Separately, security researchers have identified serious vulnerabilities in Cisco and Palo Alto networking equipment that allow attackers to bypass authentication; if your organisation uses these products, ensure your IT team is aware and applying patches promptly.

For families, KnowBe4 has launched a free cyber safety hub called CAPY, designed to help parents and children stay safer online — worth sharing with staff.

**Practical tip:** If you receive any emails claiming to be from your learning platform or network provider asking you to log in or verify details, go directly to the official website rather than clicking any links.
